## Use case

<!-- What real problem are you trying to solve? "I want to ..."
     is the prompt we need. If a user story helps, write it
     as "As a <role>, I want <capability>, so that <outcome>." -->

## Proposed API / behaviour

<!-- A sketch of the user-facing change.
     - New Settings tab field?
     - New sidebar control?
     - New argument on an existing function?
     - New model id in `AVAILABLE_MODELS`?
     Show the rough shape; the implementation is a separate
     discussion. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What else did you think about, and why is this proposal
     better? "Do nothing" is a valid answer if the alternative
     is genuinely "ship a workaround in the docs". -->

## Blockers / dependencies

<!-- Does this require:
     - A new dependency in requirements.txt?
     - A new entry in app_helpers.AVAILABLE_MODELS (and the
       `curl` recipe to verify it exists on OpenCode Zen)?
     - A schema migration for the SQLite conversation store?
     - Breaking the public CLI / Streamlit API?
     List anything that has to land first. -->

## Willingness to contribute

<!-- Are you planning to send a PR, or is this a request
     for someone else to pick up? -->
